sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (string1 String, string2 String);
UPDATE test_strings SET string2 = 'kerstin' WHERE string1 = 'karolin';
SELECT byteHammingDistance(string1, string2) AS distance FROM test_strings;
SELECT byteHammingDistance('hello', 'hallo') AS distance, byteHammingDistance('clickhouse', 'clickhause') AS distance2;
